# kCTFontFeatureTypeIdentifierKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontFeatureTypeIdentifierKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeaturetypeidentifierkey)

-  kCTFontFeatureTypeIdentifierKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontFeatureTypeIdentifierKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontFeatureTypeIdentifierKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeaturetypeidentifierkey#Discussion)

Key to get the font feature type value as a `CFNumberRef` object.
